title: 有馬記念の後に・1年後に会おう

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan fights hard, but in the end, she can't
match Oguri Cap, who is a cut above the rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It was no use... I thought I had it, but Oguri kept on going...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That power... What an amazing race... Did she
mean for it to play out like that? Is she just that
talented?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you, Trainer. I'm... sorry I couldn't win
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She was so strong. This is what a superstar is
really like.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You did good out there too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I never expected a classic-year racer to make it
here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it again next year. Same time, same
place. I'm excited to see your progress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: O-of course! It would be an honor, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to keep improving, even more than
you do. 'Cause I'm hungry to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After strangely declaring her next win, Oguri Cap
walks away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, look at me. My legs...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop shaking. She's such a funny person,
but she scares me too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's legs are trembling. It's just like when she
was afraid of Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I thought I got a little stronger, but I still have so
far to go...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna sulk about it, though! Gotta pump
up for next year!
choice_data_list:
Right. What race do you want to set as your
goal?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My next goal... Actually, I've already come to a
decision about that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna enter the spring Tenno Sho! I'll use this
experience in a race against McQueen, so please
help me prepare for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give her a big nod. Today's race is going to
serve as a great source of motivation for her next
competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—her rematch with Mejiro
McQueen will surely be a battle to remember.
